name: Amish Corn Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a square baking pan.
3. Mix cornmeal, flour, sugar, salt, and baking powder in a large bowl.
4. Make a well in the center of the dry ingredients.
5. Add the beaten egg, milk, and melted shortening to the well.
6. Beat until all ingredients are thoroughly blended.
7. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
8. Bake until risen and golden brown on top.
9. (Optional) Add 1/4 cup grated sharp cheese for variation.
10. Cut into squares to serve.
